visualGoal: Make an MSFS newcomer confident about the ONE thing to buy first, then walk them up the buy-order ladder (yoke/stick -> throttle -> rudder -> panels -> head tracking) with real product proof at every rung. No procedural art; real product photos only.
heroImageNote: FIXED this pass. Interrupted prior draft used /images/flight/best-flight-sim-hardware-2026.jpg (a generic editorial cover NOT in verified-product-images.json). Rule requires a verified hero path, so hero is now the verified Honeycomb Alpha (the buy-first GA pick), matching the reference racing article's verified-product-as-hero pattern.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic home MSFS flight-sim desk at cool-blue cockpit glow, a clean deck with an open mounting edge staged left-to-right in buy-order: yoke space, throttle space, rudder-pedal floor space, panel shelf, monitor-top head-tracker mount, curator Mac Donovan gesturing along the ladder, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake yoke, warped controls, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art
